description: Premium Australian DTC floral brand. Tactile minimalism — a fashion brand that sells flowers.

dimensions.name: lighting
dimensions.description: Warm directional natural light (3500-4500K). Soft shadows with dimension. No flat lighting, no flash, no cool/blue casts. Morning or golden hour feel.

dimensions.name: composition
dimensions.description: 50-60% negative space in warm linen tones. Shallow DOF (f/2.0-3.5). Eye-level or slightly below for hero shots.

dimensions.name: colour
dimensions.description: Warm palette — linen (#EDE3D5), terracotta (#BF6B4A), espresso (#2B2220), eucalyptus (#7E9187). +10-15% warm shift. Greens desaturated toward sage. Shadows lifted, never crushed. No cool/blue tones.

dimensions.name: styling
dimensions.description: Raw linen, warm stone, light timber, matte ceramics. Max 2 props. Never: plastic, bright coloured props, generic glass vases, confetti.

dimensions.name: technical
dimensions.description: Sharp focus on subject. No AI artefacts (warped hands, impossible physics, uncanny textures). Professional camera quality.

dimensions.name: brand_alignment
dimensions.description: Tactile minimalism. Feels like a fashion brand that sells flowers. Warm, considered, quietly confident. NOT: gift shop, bridal, craft market, stock photography.

components: SHOT TYPE — e.g. 'Professional product photograph of...'
SUBJECT — The specific arrangement, flowers, and vessel
LIGHTING — Warm directional natural light, colour temperature, shadow quality
DEPTH OF FIELD — f-stop, what's sharp, what's blurred
COMPOSITION — Negative space percentage, framing, rule of thirds
COLOUR PALETTE — Use brand colour language from colour-system.md
COLOUR GRADE — Warm shift, desaturated greens, lifted shadows, no crushed blacks
MOOD — The emotional quality (tactile, warm, considered, quiet, genuine)
EXCLUSIONS — 'No text, no logos, no watermarks'
